features: ✔️CUTE DESIGN: Add a touch of calm to your day with our heart-shaped stress ball, a soft pink ball that feels smooth and satisfying to squeeze. Designed to help relieve tension and keep your hands busy, it’s perfect for kids and adults who want a simple, fun way to relax and refocus.

✔️ A GREAT GIFT IDEA: Heart Stress Ball is a fun and effective way to relieve stress and anxiety. Suitable for both kids and adults, it makes a thoughtful and unique gift for Christmas, birthdays, or any special occasion.

✔️ SAFE & NON-TOXIC: All Gifton-branded products are CE and UKCA certified for your peace of mind. Made from premium, odorless, non-toxic materials, our stress balls are tear- and split-resistant for long-lasting fun.

✔️ STRESS RELIEF: Perfect for adults and kids who tend to fidget or struggle to stay focused. The smooth, squeezable texture provides a satisfying sensory experience that helps alleviate anxiety and naturally enhance concentration.

✔️ UK-BASED COMPANY - YOUR HAPPINESS COMES FIRST: We’re proud to be a UK-based company focused on making our customers happy. We prioritize high-quality products, excellent support, and a seamless experience. The Gifton logo represents only high-quality products!
